emails.subject: Re: Dunn Subpoena
emails.body: Re: Dunn Subpoena It's just that I can't begin to imagine a better or more noble spokesman, especially portrayed in the light of a martyr, than you. Will you wear the shirt? I think the camera loves it. Mark

emails.subject: Re: Dunn Subpoena
emails.body: May you be forced to spend eternity with David Lazarus.... P.S. I'm taking next week off. I'll be in the Middle East for martyr training. Best, Jeff Mark Palmer 07/06/2001 12:15 PM
